text.tspan: Chassis earth bus (GRN 14 AWG) - PSU-001 PE, ESP/MAX board mounting screws (if metal)
Panel Wiring - Zone 4 of 4: CONTROL BAY (low-voltage side)
PSU-001 internal earth bond is the SINGLE PE <-> signal-GND tie - do not add another.
All TC cables shielded, drained at the panel end only. SCK / MISO are shared SPI; CS individual.
DR-016: PANEL FACE carries SW-002 (Heater Enable, in series with SSR drive) + LED-001/002 (POWER/FAULT).
DR-017: ESP USB tethered to Pi 5 (Zone E); Pi 5 runs Artisan natively + serves WebLCDs to iPad over WiFi.
Cable schedule (cables entering / leaving this zone)
